column1: INSTAGRAM — Username OSINT Data Point Map

column3: INVESTIGATIVE VALUE
Primary identifier — same username across platforms suggests same person
Real identity clue, compare across platforms / records
Often contains email, phone, other accounts, location
Reverse image search, compare faces across platforms, detect fake accounts
Bot detection — unusual ratios flag fake accounts, gauge influence
Ratio check — bots follow thousands, few followers
Account-age estimation, activity level
Leads to other websites, business pages, hidden identities
Confirms identity for public figures, rules out impersonation
Reveals profession/industry, useful for fraud cases
New account during incident period = suspicious, old account = more credible
Behaviour patterns, associates, hashtags, locations visited
Interest mapping, group affiliations, campaign or radicalisation tracking
Activity pattern analysis, time-zone detection
Physical location history — where has subject been?
Network mapping — who subject interacts with physically
Communication network — who subject talks about/to
Communication style, associates, threats, confessions
Real face photos, real-name tags, location tags by others
Match same photo across platforms even if cropped/filtered
Cross-platform identity link — Facebook has real-name requirement
Reveals interests, business, relationships — titles always public
Content-creator vs casual-user profiling
Geographic location of account — jurisdiction, cross-border cases
Old usernames if subject changed handle to hide identity — critical for tracking
If subject runs ads — reveals business, products, scam campaigns, reach
Business/Creator accounts expose extra contact info
Direct contact info — sometimes real email linked to other accounts
Real phone number — traceable via Truecaller, police records
Physical address of business — for raids, verification
What subject WANTS people to see — most important content to them
Reveals close associates who collaborated on content
Direct interaction trace between subject and a known associate
Full network map of who follows subject
Who subject follows — interests, associates, targets
Interest graph, stalker/association patterns
GPS coordinates, device model, original timestamp before editing
Evidence of planning, threats, deals — most critical for cases
Direct cross-platform link — confirms professional identity of account owner
Work email (company domain) — ties Instagram to employer, enables LinkedIn lookup
